title: selaginella sandwithii
intro: Selaginella sandwithii, also known as Sandwith's spikemoss, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Selaginella sandwithii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions.
